name: Mailbox Export to Exchange Webserver
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Rich Warren, Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Mailbox Export to Exchange Webserver
SIGMA Description: Detects a successful export of an Exchange mailbox to untypical directory or with aspx name suffix which can be used to place a webshell or the needed role assignment for it

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new-mailboxexportrequest%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -mailbox %') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-filepath "\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.aspx%')) OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new-managementroleassignment%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -role "mailbox import export"%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -user %')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Mailbox Export to Exchange Webserver on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new-mailboxexportrequest%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -mailbox %') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-filepath "\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.aspx%')) OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new-managementroleassignment%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -role "mailbox import export"%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -user %')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Mailbox Export to Exchange Webserver
